mysite
Table of Contents

Class ResultadoIngresoDTO

Namespace
BLL.DTOs
Assembly
BLL.dll

Result returned by ClienteService.ValidarIngreso describing whether a client is permitted to enter the facility and the reason when access is denied.

public class ResultadoIngresoDTO
Inheritance
object
ResultadoIngresoDTO
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

When Permitido is false, Razon contains a localized message suitable for display (e.g., client inactive, outstanding debt). Balance is always populated so the UI can show the client's account state regardless of the access decision.

Constructors

ResultadoIngresoDTO() 

public ResultadoIngresoDTO()

Properties

Balance

Current account balance in currency units at the time of the validation.

public decimal Balance { get; set; }

Property Value

decimal

NombreCliente

Full name of the client ("Nombre Apellido").

public string NombreCliente { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Permitido

true if the client is allowed entry and a check-in record was created.

public bool Permitido { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Razon

Localized denial reason, or null when Permitido is true.

public string Razon { get; set; }

Property Value

string
